title: Crystal Korean Tomato Curry
description: A savory, glassy-topped Korean curry with diced tomatoes, aromatic tadka, and a sugar-free twist.

ingredients.name: diced tomatoes
ingredients.notes: fresh or canned without added sugar

ingredients.name: cornstarch slurry
ingredients.amount: 1 tbsp cornstarch mixed with 2 tbsp water

instructions: Heat sesame oil in a medium pot over medium heat.
Add cumin and coriander seeds and toast until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Stir in minced garlic and ginger, cooking until aromatic, 1 minute.
Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Pour in diced tomatoes and simmer for 5 minutes to release juices.
Stir in turmeric, gochugaru, soy sauce, salt, and black pepper, mixing well.
Add vegetable broth and bring the mixture to a boil, then lower heat and simmer for 4 minutes.
Pour the cornstarch slurry slowly, whisking constantly, and cook until the sauce thickens and glazes, about 2 minutes.
Remove from heat and stir in lime juice.
Serve hot, garnished with toasted sesame seeds, and enjoy a crystal-clear Korean tomato curry.
